_meta.note: Machine-seeded Wave 13-14. Real translated strings in native script. Human review required before ratification.

speakFriend.title: Vuga incuti, usome.
speakFriend.description: Liana Banyan yaranguwe kugira ngo ivugure ku rurimi rwose. Ururimi rwose rufunguye rufite umusanzu umwe wo guhindura.
speakFriend.provisionalNotice: Urutonde rw'indimi n'ingano z'Marks ni rw'igihe gito. Marks ibimenyetso vy'ugutera imbere, si imigabane.
speakFriend.bountyDescription: Hindura Liana Banyan mu {{language}}. Unguka {{marks}} Marks.
speakFriend.speakFounderDesc: Ijambo ryose muri sisitemu iyi ryatowe n'impamvu. Inkomoko y'amazina 26 y'ingenzi.
speakFriend.step1Body: Fungura Umusanzu wo Guhindura ku kibaho Help Wanted.
speakFriend.step2Body: Hindura ivyari bikenwa vyose. Ohereza ukoresheje Bounty Poster.
speakFriend.step3Body: Nyuma yo kwemeranwa, uzahabwa Marks kandi uzandikwe muri IP Ledger.
speakFriend.subtitle: "Vuga incuti, injira."

languageSwitcher.tip: Koresha ibifaranga vy'indimi zitandukanye ku muryango wa Durin kugira ngo ukingure uburambe budasanzwe!
